home.tagline: Residential and commercial plumbing with clear communication and careful work. Same-day and emergency scheduling when available.
home.areasBody: Based in the 818 area, we routinely serve the San Fernando Valley and nearby Los Angeles County communities.

services.heading: Services
services.lead: Scope and pricing are confirmed on site or after photos and a short phone consult. If we are not the right fit, we say so early.
services.footnote: Not all work is available in every jurisdiction. Permits, inspections, and specialty trades are coordinated as required.

groups.title: Fixtures and appliances
items: Laundry boxes and ice maker lines

groups.title: Gas plumbing
items: Gas line sizing and installation where licensed and permitted

serviceAreas.heading: Service areas
serviceAreas.lead: Dispatch is centered on the San Fernando Valley (818). Nearby Los Angeles County cities are often available; longer drive times may affect scheduling windows.
serviceAreas.citiesNote: List is illustrative, not exhaustive. Call with your address to confirm availability and same-day options.

about.heading: About
about.intro: {business} focuses on predictable scheduling, tidy job sites, and options explained in plain language before work begins.
values: Permits pulled when code requires it
Respect for your time and property
about.credentialsBody: Add license numbers, bonding, insurance carrier, and years in business here when provided by ownership. This block is intentionally plain so legal and marketing can drop in final copy without fighting layout.

contact.heading: Contact
contact.intro: Fastest response is a phone call. For non-urgent questions, email works when you add your address and a short description.
contact.hoursBody: Replace with real dispatch hours and emergency policy. If you offer 24/7 emergency, state how after-hours fees are quoted.
contact.mailBody: Add a mailing address or P.O. box for customers and vendors. Keeping this separate from the phone block preserves layout when the design team applies branding.
contact.note: {business} — contact page. No form yet to avoid spam and extra client JavaScript; add a server action or third-party form when ready.
